name: Smartglasses
description: Even Realities G1/G2 smartglasses integration for display text, microphone audio, side-tap mic control, and bridge/simulator workflows.

SMARTGLASSES_TRANSPORT.label: Transport
SMARTGLASSES_TRANSPORT.help: Preferred smartglasses transport: auto, even-bridge, web-bluetooth, or noble.

SMARTGLASSES_SCAN_TIMEOUT_MS.label: Scan Timeout
SMARTGLASSES_SCAN_TIMEOUT_MS.help: BLE scan timeout in milliseconds for Noble-based direct G1 connections.

SMARTGLASSES_AUTO_INIT.label: Auto Init
SMARTGLASSES_AUTO_INIT.help: Send G1 connection-ready init packets after connecting.

SMARTGLASSES_INIT_MODE.label: Init Mode
SMARTGLASSES_INIT_MODE.help: Connection-ready init mode: lens-specific or official same-init.
